hero.title: Data and applied-AI architecture for businesses of every size.
hero.subtitle: We design and operate your data and applied-AI architecture: from unified CRM to data lake, from e-commerce to agentic copilots. One architecture, one roadmap, one accountable team.

credentials.track: Over a decade in complex markets

footer.tagline: Boutique firm for digital architecture and applied AI.
footer.location: We operate from Caracas, Venezuela and New York.
footer.rights: © 2026 TheTreeWay. Made with care in LatAm.

filter.title: We're not for everyone. And that's deliberate.
filter.bullet1: Enterprise groups with multiple operating verticals that need to unify under a single data and process architecture.
filter.bullet2: Traditional organizations —automotive, agribusiness, energy, retail, services— that understand the next decade is won with data and applied AI, not with more spreadsheets.
filter.bullet3: Executive leadership that already has five technology vendors and still has no coherent roadmap.
filter.close: If your organization fits any of the three profiles, we can help. If not, we save you the time and tell you who can.

model.title: One architecture, six layers, a single accountability.
model.subtitle: We don't sell loose services. We design the complete architecture of your digital ecosystem and operate it layer by layer, in the order your organization can absorb.
model.diagramDesc: Six stacked layers, from data capture at the base to the agentic layer at the top. Each layer is interactive.
model.close: Each layer ships as an independent module with its own business value, but connected to the previous ones and ready for the next. You don't have to buy everything at once. You do have to start from the right foundation.
model.layer1Desc: Web, app, point of sale, dealerships, IoT, legacy systems.
model.layer2Desc: A single customer across every vertical of the group.
model.layer3Desc: Omnichannel support, e-commerce and unified sales flows.
model.layer4Desc: Single historical repository. Source of truth for analytics and models.
model.layer5Desc: Dashboards, executive KPIs and a biweekly operating committee.
model.layer6Desc: Vertical copilots on top of the stack. AI applied to real business processes.

enfoque.title: Who we work for and how.
enfoque.subtitle: Our client filter, the six-layer model and the path from diagnostics to operations.

cases.title: What we've built.
cases.subtitle: Three real operations in complex markets. No inflated metrics. Just what happened.
cases.case1Title: Unified digital architecture for five operating verticals.
cases.case1Body: A conglomerate with divisions in automotive, motorcycles, agricultural machinery, solar energy and construction equipment operated with five siloed data ecosystems and twelve different software vendors. We designed and implemented the six-layer model, starting with the customer golden record and the biweekly operating executive committee.
cases.case1Stack: PostgreSQL, Next.js, FastAPI, n8n, BI, Agentic layer · Claude
cases.case2Title: An owned digital product in a market with fragile infrastructure.
cases.case2Body: We designed and built a credit platform for vehicle financing in a market with banking-infrastructure limitations, high informality and complex currency dynamics. Integration with a partner bank, alternative scoring, dealership panel and a complete mobile experience.
cases.case2Stack: Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, JWT, Nginx · Gunicorn
cases.case3Title: Reconciliation middleware between two operating realities.
cases.case3Body: A used cooking-oil collection operation in New York with hundreds of clients across restaurant chains needed to reconcile billing against the client's enterprise system without direct database access. We designed the reconciliation middleware, collections automation and the cross-border operating architecture.
cases.case3Stack: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Google Places API, n8n, Claude · parsing

howWeWork.title: From diagnostic to operation, without skipping steps.
howWeWork.phase1Body: Immersion in the business. Interviews with executive leadership and vertical leads. Map of the current ecosystem. Deliverable: diagnostic document and architecture proposal.
howWeWork.phase2Body: Detailed design of the six layers. Phased implementation plan, budget, schedule, vendor matrix. Deliverable: target architecture and an executable roadmap.
howWeWork.phase3Body: Layer-by-layer construction. Each deliverable is a layer running in production with a team trained to operate it. Support through a biweekly executive committee.
howWeWork.phase4Body: Agentic layer, iterative improvements, new digital products.

author.title: The firm has an author.
author.name: Rubén Bolívar
author.bio1: Over a decade designing digital products and data ecosystems for organizations operating in Latin American markets. I work at the intersection of enterprise architecture, fintech and applied AI, focused on traditional enterprise groups rewriting how they operate.
author.bio2: Before TheTreeWay I built a vehicle-credit fintech platform in Venezuela and collaborated on cross-border operations between New York and LatAm. Today I lead TheTreeWay and write about digital transformation in emerging markets.
author.quote: The digital transformation of an enterprise group is not bought. It is designed, operated and learned. My job is to accompany that process with a coherent architecture and no shortcuts.

techStack.close: The choice of stack depends on the problem, not on the trend.

contact.title: Two ways to start.
contact.card1Body: A 45-minute conversation with Rubén to understand your context and assess whether TheTreeWay is the right firm for your organization. No cost, no commitment.
contact.card2Body: Have a specific question about architecture, applied AI or digital transformation? Write to us.
contact.waSent: We've opened WhatsApp with your inquiry ready to send. Just review it and hit send. If it didn't open, use the button.
contact.errMessage: Tell us briefly about your context (at least 10 characters).
